symptoms: white powdery layer appearing on leaf surface

local_terms: neeche walay patte peelay ho rahe hain
symptoms: yellowing of leaves starting from edges or lower leaves

local_terms: patte murh ke lapet ho gaye
patte andar ki taraf murh gaye
patti murh ke choti ho gayi
patte murh ke sukh rahe hain
symptoms: leaves curling inward, twisted shape, reduced size, unhealthy growth

local_terms: patton par daag barh rahe hain
symptoms: black or dark brown spots spreading on leaf surface

problem: Small insects under leaves (Sap sucking pests)
local_terms: patton ke neeche chipkay huay keere
patton ke neeche jhund bana hua
patte chipak rahe hain keero ki wajah se
symptoms: tiny insects under leaves, sticky surface, leaf discoloration

local_terms: patte tukray tukray ho rahe hain
symptoms: visible holes and eaten leaf parts due to insects

local_terms: paudha theek se nahi pal raha
paudha sookha sookha lag raha hai
symptoms: slow growth, weak stem, small leaves, unhealthy plant

local_terms: patton ke kinare sookh rahe hain
patton ke konay brown ho gaye
patte kinare se murjha rahe hain
patton ke sides jal rahe hain
patton ka kinara khushk ho gaya
symptoms: leaf edges turning brown and dry while center remains green

local_terms: tana neechay se kaala ho gaya
pauday ka tana kamzor ho gaya
symptoms: stem base turning black, rotting, plant falling

local_terms: kachi phal zameen par gir rahi hai
phal lag kar gir jata hai
phool lag kar toot jata hai
pauday se phal tik nahi raha
symptoms: flowers or young fruits dropping before maturity

problem: Leaves turning brown spots (Brown leaf spot / blight)
local_terms: patte jalay jaisay lag rahe hain
patton par daag phail rahe hain
symptoms: brown dry spots spreading on leaves, sometimes surrounded by yellow margin

problem: White lines on leaves (Leaf miner damage)
local_terms: patte ke andar safed rasta bana hua
patton par tedhi medhi safed line
patte ke andar se keera guzra hua lagta hai
patton ke andar lakeer jaisi safedi
symptoms: thin white winding lines inside leaves caused by leaf miner larvae

local_terms: paudha din mein murjha jata hai
dhoop mein paudha jhuk jata hai
paudha din ko latak jata hai
paudha pani ke bawajood murjha raha hai
paudha dopahar mein bejaan lagta hai
paudha shaam ko theek ho jata hai
paudha garmi mein murjha jata hai
symptoms: plant droops during hot hours and may recover in evening

local_terms: jarr se badboo aa rahi hai
paudha jarr se kamzor ho gaya
jarr ka rang kaala ho gaya
jarr mitti mein gal rahi hai
symptoms: roots turning brown or black, soft, foul smell, weak yellow plant

problem: Yellow lines on leaves (Leaf streak / viral symptom)
local_terms: patton mein peeli dhari ban gayi hai
patton par naqsh jaisi peeli lakeer
patte par peela nishan seedha chal raha hai
symptoms: yellow streaks or straight lines appearing on leaf surface

problem: Very small or weak leaves (Micronutrient deficiency)
local_terms: patte theek se nahi khul rahe
patte sukhay aur kamzor lagte hain
patte sahi size ke nahi ban rahe
symptoms: leaves remain small, thin, weak and underdeveloped
